changes: OpenClaw cut fresh stable release v2026.4.26, published on 2026-04-28 01:11 UTC.
Hermes Agent still has no newer release than v2026.4.23, but it climbed again to roughly 121.4k stars in this scan.
AstrBot remains on fresh stable v4.23.6 from 2026-04-27 05:09 UTC, and SwarmClaw remains on fresh stable v1.6.1 from 2026-04-27 10:55 UTC.
HiClaw still shows recent v1.1.0 from 2026-04-24, while the rest of the map looks active but structurally unchanged.
whyItMatters: The main new fact is that OpenClaw moved from fast prerelease churn to a fresh stable anchor, which is the clearest high-signal category update in this run.
Hermes' continued growth reinforces that the learning-loop lane remains strategically important even without a newer tag.
AstrBot, SwarmClaw, and HiClaw still show that adjacent messaging-agent and orchestration players are shipping quickly, even though none changed the taxonomy today.
Net: meaningful movement happened, but it strengthens the existing strategic read rather than changing it.
